alt: Close-up of blue whale twin blowholes on top of its head
caption: A blue whale breathes through two blowholes and can spout water 30 feet into the air.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated blue whale close-up image with verified species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/Blue_Whale_003_noaa_blowholes.jpg
